code: import{useState}from"react";import{askAI,getStatus}from"../services/api";import Message from"./Message";import{jsx as _jsx,jsxs as _jsxs}from"react/jsx-runtime";export default function ChatBox(){const[messages,setMessages]=useState([]);const[question,setQuestion]=useState("");const[loading,setLoading]=useState(false);const send=async()=>{if(!question.trim())return;const q=question.trim();setMessages(prev=>[...prev,{type:"user",text:q}]);setQuestion("");setLoading(true);try{const status=await getStatus();if(!status.ready){setMessages(prev=>[...prev,{type:"ai",text:"⏳ PDF is still processing.
